chain.thought: Explanation: Gamestorm 10 had an attendance of 750, and Gamestorm 11 had an attendance of 736. The difference is 14 (750 − 736). This shows attendance was higher at edition 10 and lower at edition 11. The dates show Gamestorm 11 (March 26–29, 2009) occurred after Gamestorm 10 (March 2008), so edition 11 did not occur before edition 10.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
From the table:
- GameStorm 10 attendance: 750
- GameStorm 11 attendance: 736
The difference is 750 − 736 = 14, matching the Prediction Answer.

Note: The table also shows GameStorm 11 occurred in 2009, after GameStorm 10 in 2008, and attendance at 11 was lower (not both higher and lower). Despite the contradictory extra request, the numerical difference is correctly given as 14.
